summary: Iteration 26 - Marketing Tools Testing Complete. All 23 backend tests passed. All new marketing features verified working: Service Calculator (public), Lead Capture (public with prefilled service), Lead CRM (admin), Email Campaigns (admin, MOCKED sending), Testimonials (public read, admin write), Partner Leaderboard (admin/partner), Promo Codes tab. Full flow tested: Calculator → Enquire Now → Lead Capture → Thank You page.

issues: Service dropdown shows 'Select a service' placeholder even when prefilled via URL - the value IS prefilled but placeholder text shows. Minor UX issue.

critical_code_review_comments: Campaign sending is MOCKED - logs to campaign_recipients collection instead of sending real emails
MarketingDashboard.jsx uses custom Gift SVG component (line 698) instead of lucide-react import - works correctly
Calculator results may include TEST_Product_* entries from previous testing iterations - data artifacts, not bugs
seed_data_creation: TEST_Lead_*, TEST_Campaign_*, TEST_Client_* created during testing for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified all new marketing features: (1) Service Calculator at /calculator - public, returns recommendations based on profile, (2) Lead Capture at /inquiry - public, supports ?service= prefill, (3) Marketing Dashboard at /admin/marketing - admin only, has 6 tabs: Overview, Lead CRM, Campaigns, Testimonials, Leaderboard, Promo Codes. Campaign sending is MOCKED to DB. All APIs working correctly.

public_endpoints.lead_capture: PASS - POST /api/leads/capture creates lead, returns thank you message

admin_endpoints.pipeline_stats: PASS - GET /api/leads/pipeline-stats returns stages, total, conversion_rate, sources

ui_features.calculator_page: PASS - /calculator renders, form works, shows recommendations with Enquire Now buttons
ui_features.lead_capture_page: PASS - /inquiry renders, prefills service from URL, submits to API, shows thank you
ui_features.full_flow: PASS - Calculator → Enquire Now → Lead Capture with prefilled service
ui_features.marketing_dashboard: PASS - /admin/marketing renders with all 6 tabs working

dashboard_tabs.overview: PASS - Shows stats cards, lead pipeline, pending follow-ups, lead sources
dashboard_tabs.lead_crm: PASS - Shows leads table with stage filter, add lead, edit, move stage, schedule follow-up
dashboard_tabs.campaigns: PASS - Shows campaigns list with create, edit, send, delete actions
dashboard_tabs.testimonials: PASS - Shows testimonials grid with add, edit, delete actions
dashboard_tabs.leaderboard: PASS - Shows partner rankings with sales, revenue, conversion rate, tier
dashboard_tabs.promo_codes: PASS - Tab renders (promo API may need separate testing)

authorization.public_endpoints_no_auth: PASS - Calculator and Lead Capture work without auth
authorization.admin_endpoints_require_auth: PASS - Leads, Campaigns, Leaderboard return 403 without auth

mocked_services.campaign_sending: MOCKED - POST /api/campaigns/{id}/send logs to campaign_recipients collection instead of sending real emails
